hero.title: Bring clarity, control and growth to your ads
hero.subtitle: Organize all your campaigns, discover where you're losing money (and where you can actually win) while gaining time to focus on what really generates results.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.subtitle: You shouldn't waste time and money trying to understand your campaigns. But reality is different.

issues.title: Campaigns scattered across multiple dashboards
issues.description: You waste time navigating between different platforms

issues.title: Hours spent on manual reports and analysis
issues.description: Time that could be used to optimize campaigns

issues.title: Lack of clarity about ROI and opportunities
issues.description: You don't know where to invest more or cut costs

solution.title: Introducing Loquia
solution.intro: You see your campaigns in one environment, understand what deserves attention and act with confidence. It's a platform that simplifies, organizes and accelerates the work of those who need to generate results.

benefits.title: Consolidated view
benefits.description: All your campaigns in a single dashboard

benefits.title: Fast problem identification
benefits.description: Detect opportunities and risks in real-time

benefits.title: Time savings
benefits.description: Less time analyzing, more time optimizing

items.title: See everything in one place
items.description: Connect Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, LinkedIn Ads, X Ads and YouTube Ads

items.title: Make fast and safe decisions
items.description: Clear and actionable data in real-time

items.title: Grow with predictability
items.description: Track metrics and trends with clarity

target_audience.title: Who is Loquia for?
target_audience.subtitle: Three profiles that benefit the most

profiles.name: Marketing Agencies
profiles.description: Manage multiple clients and need consolidated view, automated reports and predictability to deliver consistent results.

profiles.name: Media Professionals / Media Buyers
profiles.description: Live under pressure for results, spend hours analyzing data and need clarity to optimize campaigns quickly.

profiles.name: Small and Medium Businesses
profiles.description: Invest in ads but have little clarity on ROI. Want to understand what works and make decisions with confidence.
